niveus.title: Niveus Solutions
niveus.responsibilities: I built scalable backend services with **Node.js** on **GCP**, creating secure APIs and fine-tuning databases so applications stayed fast and drama-free. I deployed and managed **containerized apps** with **Docker** and **Kubernetes (Cloud Run, App Engine, GKE)**, keeping production smooth, stable, and (almost) bug-free — because I preferred fixing issues before they introduced themselves to users. 😄

tcs.title: Tata Consultancy Services
tcs.responsibilities: I built modern, high-performance web applications using **React**, **Node.js**, **Redux**, and **SCSS**, keeping the code clean, modular, and hopefully Monday-proof. I designed responsive UIs, created reusable components, and developed **REST APIs** to deliver smooth end-to-end features, including integrations with insurance systems like **Fineos**. I worked in **Agile** teams using **Azure DevOps** with **CI/CD** pipelines, ensured **ADA** compliance, boosted automated **test coverage** to around **85%** with **Jest**, and pitched in to fix production issues—trying to keep users happy and the bugs at bay. 😅
